name: imos VR LOFT
short_description: Immerse yourself in the world of virtual reality with imos and test the possibilities for yourself. Show playfully, kinematics of fittings or change live the colors and sizes of kitchen fronts, for example.
detailed_description: Virtual Reality for imos AG means not only technology, but also a modern visualization tool for sketching planning results, created with imos software. How imos technology can be integrated into the sales process as playfully, but nevertheless sales-promoting, it can also be integrated into the sales process, imos AG shows for the first time in the so-called "VR LOFT". The visitors are invited to take a look at the virtual experience and to marvel at the new possibilities.
